summary:
Ubrogepant is an FDA-approved CGRP antagonist indicated for the acute treatment of migraines with or without aura and has been shown to be effectively reduce pain during migraine attacks. Clinical guidelines confirm its efficacy in providing rapid relief compared to placebo in controlled trials.  

The summary above contains redundant information not present in Agent1’s original response; please revise accordingly based only on what was stated within Agent1’s actual reasoning.

Only include facts presented in Agent1's own words or direct inference from their statements – do NOT add external details or rephrase inaccurately.

Revised Summary:

Ubrogepant is used for acute treatment of migraine with or without aura and is part of a class (CGRP antagonists) proven effective for acute migraine treatment, supporting its established efficacy in managing migraine attacks.
